sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14765" key="a)rge/nnaos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργένναος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14765.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀργεννός</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.35</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theoph.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
